audience: Belgian rental businesses comparing custom booking and administration platforms
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een concreet meertalig verhuurplatform met reservaties, beschikbaarheidscontrole, levering en facturatie bekijken.

searchIntent.question: What can a multilingual bouncy castle rental and booking platform bring together?

directAnswer: BM Jumpfun combines a multilingual public rental website with bookings, availability checks, route calculations, calendar integration, invoicing and a shared management environment.
title: BM Jumpfun bouncy castle rental and booking platform | VisualVibe
metaDescription: See how VisualVibe built BM Jumpfun's multilingual bouncy castle rental platform with bookings, availability checks, Google Calendar, route calculations and invoicing.
